summary: Iteration 99: Final Launch Polish Test - All features verified. Dashboard drag handles now hidden by default (only shown in 'Rearrange' edit mode). Share button added to profile page. SmartDock minimize positions to bottom-right corner correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All final launch polish features verified. Dashboard drag handles fix working correctly - no grip icons visible by default, only shown when 'Rearrange' button clicked.

dashboard_drag_handles_fix.details: Drag handles (GripVertical icons) are now hidden by default (editMode=false). 'Rearrange' button visible in dashboard header. Clicking 'Rearrange' shows 6 drag handles and changes button text to 'Done'. Clicking 'Done' hides all drag handles again.

profile_share_button.details: Share button with data-testid='share-profile-btn' visible on profile page. Uses Web Share API with clipboard fallback.

profile_page_elements.details: Profile page loads with avatar (H initial), name (Happy), Edit Profile button, and Customization section (Theme, Music, Avatar).

smartdock_minimize.details: SmartDock minimize button clicks → tiny dot in bottom-right corner (x=1876, y=934). Restore button clicks → full dock returns.

settings_page.details: Settings page loads with Sound & Audio (Ambient Soundscape, Sound Effects, Ambient Volume), Visual & Display (5 Color Themes), and Accessibility sections (Reduce Motion, Reduce Particles, Reduce Flashing, High Contrast, Font Size).

navigation.details: All major pages load correctly: Homepage, Dashboard, Profile, Settings, Trade Circle, Pricing.

backend_regression.details: GET /api/profile/me returns 200. GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns 5 tiers. GET /api/trade-circle/listings returns listings.
